name: fantasy points query with career_year param and per_game rate type
description: Test case for fantasy points query with career_year param and per_game rate type
expected_query: with "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" left join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player_gamelogs"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "nfl_games"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = "nfl_games"."seas_type" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 3 group by "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_ffd9fa42f97c" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "role_union"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "nfl_games"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = "nfl_games"."seas_type" where "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 3 group by "role_union"."pid" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."nfl_draft_year" AS "nfl_draft_year_0", "player"."dpos" AS "dpos_0", "player"."ngs_draft_grade" AS "ngs_draft_grade_0", "player"."ngs_production_score" AS "ngs_production_score_0", "player"."ngs_athleticism_score" AS "ngs_athleticism_score_0", "player"."ngs_size_score" AS "ngs_size_score_0", "player"."height" AS "height_0", CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24" AS "top_24_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_1", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_1", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24" AS "top_24_from_careerlogs_1", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_ffd9fa42f97c.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7" on "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_ffd9fa42f97c" on "rate_aggregate_ffd9fa42f97c"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 left join "scoring_format_player_careerlogs" as "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044" on "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' where player.nfl_draft_year >= '2015' AND player.pos IN ('WR') AND player.height <= '71' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."nfl_draft_year", "player"."dpos", "player"."ngs_draft_grade", "player"."ngs_production_score", "player"."ngs_athleticism_score", "player"."ngs_size_score", "player"."height", rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 17 DESC NULLS LAST, 16 DESC NULLS LAST, 15 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
